name: project_overview
content: Bean & Brew is a Go web application for a coffee shop. Architecture: Clean Architecture with layers entity, usecase, repository, handler. Tech stack: Go, chi router, SQLite, html/template. The project has 62 tests across 4 levels: unit (32), integration (13), API (10), usecase (7).

name: entity_layer
content: Entity layer contains domain types: Product (ID, Name, Description, Price, CategoryID, ImageURL, Active), Category (ID, Name, Description, SortOrder), NewsItem (ID, Title, Content, PublishedAt, ImageURL, Active) with Summary(n) method that truncates using runes for correct UTF-8, Order (ID, Items, Status, Total, CreatedAt) with status flow new→processing→completed or new/processing→cancelled. Order has methods: CalculateTotal(), CanCancel(), CanComplete(), Validate(). Product has Validate() checking required fields.

name: repository_layer
content: Repository interfaces defined in repository/interfaces.go: ProductRepository (Create, GetByID, List, Update, Delete, Search, Count), CategoryRepository (Create, GetByID, List, Update, Delete), NewsRepository (Create, GetByID, List, Update, Delete), OrderRepository (Create, GetByID, List, UpdateStatus). SQLite implementations in repository/sqlite/ package. Migrations create tables: categories, products, news, orders, order_items. Seed data populates initial categories and products.

name: usecase_layer
content: Usecase layer contains business logic services: ProductUsecase (wraps ProductRepository with validation), CategoryUsecase, NewsUsecase, OrderUsecase (manages order lifecycle: create with total calculation, cancel, complete with status validation).

name: handler_layer
content: Handler layer has HTTP handlers using chi router. API endpoints: GET/POST /api/v1/products, GET/PUT/DELETE /api/v1/products/{id}, GET/POST /api/v1/categories, GET/POST /api/v1/news, GET/POST /api/v1/orders, POST /api/v1/orders/{id}/cancel, POST /api/v1/orders/{id}/complete. Pages: /, /catalog, /news. Helpers: respondJSON, respondError, parseID.

name: unit_tests
content: Unit tests (32 total) in entity package: TestUnitProductValidate (table-driven, 5 subcases: valid, empty name, negative price, zero price, long name), TestUnitProductValidateDescription, TestUnitProductValidateImageURL, TestUnitOrderCalculateTotal, TestUnitOrderCalculateTotalEmpty, TestUnitOrderCalculateTotalSingleItem, TestUnitOrderCalculateTotalLargeOrder, TestUnitOrderCanCancel (4 subcases: new, processing, completed, cancelled), TestUnitOrderCanComplete, TestUnitOrderValidate (5 subcases), TestUnitOrderValidateItems, TestUnitOrderStatusTransitions, TestUnitCategoryValidation, TestUnitNewsItemSummary (tests rune-based UTF-8 truncation), TestUnitNewsItemSummaryEdgeCases, TestUnitNewsItemValidation.

name: integration_tests
content: Integration tests (13 total) in repository/sqlite package: TestIntegrationProductCRUD, TestIntegrationProductList, TestIntegrationProductSearch (potentially flaky: uses LIKE with Cyrillic text, depends on insert order), TestIntegrationProductCount, TestIntegrationCategoryCRUD, TestIntegrationCategoryList, TestIntegrationOrderCRUD, TestIntegrationOrderList, TestIntegrationOrderStatusUpdate, TestIntegrationOrderCancelFlow, TestIntegrationOrderCompleteFlow, TestIntegrationSeedData, TestIntegrationMigrations. All use setupTestDB() helper that creates in-memory SQLite.

name: usecase_tests
content: Usecase tests (7 total): TestUsecaseProductCreate, TestUsecaseProductCreateValidationError, TestUsecaseProductGetByID, TestUsecaseProductList, TestUsecaseCategoryCreate, TestUsecaseOrderCreate, TestUsecaseOrderCancel. Use real SQLite repository (not mocks) via setupTestDB().

name: api_tests
content: API tests (10 total) in handler package: TestAPIProductCRUD (full CRUD cycle), TestAPIProductValidationError, TestAPIProductNotFound, TestAPICategoryCRUD, TestAPICategoryList, TestAPINewsCRUD, TestAPINewsList, TestAPIOrderFlow (create category→create product→create order→verify total=640), TestAPIOrderCancel, TestAPIOrderComplete. Use httptest.NewServer with full handler wiring via setupTestServer() helper.

name: test_patterns
content: Test patterns used: table-driven tests with t.Run() for parametric testing, setupTestDB() creates fresh in-memory SQLite with migrations, setupTestServer() creates httptest.NewServer with full handler stack, tests follow naming convention TestLevel_Entity_Method (e.g. TestUnitProductValidate, TestIntegrationProductCRUD, TestAPIOrderFlow). Anti-patterns to avoid: shared state between tests, testing implementation details, testing framework code.

name: flaky_test_analysis
content: TestIntegrationProductSearch is potentially flaky because: 1) It uses LIKE queries with Cyrillic text which can behave differently across SQLite versions, 2) It depends on the order of inserted records which is not guaranteed, 3) It shares the in-memory database with other tests in the same test function. TestUnitNewsItemSummary was fixed to use []rune instead of len() for correct UTF-8 string truncation.

name: file_structure
content: Project file structure: cmd/server/main.go (entry point), internal/entity/ (product.go, category.go, news.go, order.go, errors.go + *_test.go), internal/repository/interfaces.go, internal/repository/sqlite/ (db.go, migrations.go, seed.go, product.go, category.go, news.go, order.go, testhelper_test.go + *_test.go), internal/usecase/ (product.go, category.go, news.go, order.go, usecase_test.go), internal/handler/ (helpers.go, product.go, category.go, news.go, order.go, pages.go, api_test.go), templates/ (layout.html, home.html, catalog.html, news.html).
